_comment: #69 promotion lifecycle registry. One entry per gate-passed candidate or pre-registered challenger. Standing rule (PRD #69, adopted 2026-07-11): NOTHING is promoted without a demotion rule written in its entry BEFORE promotion — a promoted signal that stops working leaves by rule, not by debate. homily_promotions.py executes the forward checks against the #13 ledger; homily_validate.py asserts every entry names its gate artifact and demotion rule. Edit this file only by appending entries or filling a decision — never rewrite a frozen criterion after data starts accruing.

entries.promotion_basis: OWNER OVERRIDE, recorded 2026-07-12: promoted with NEITHER pre-registered condition met — the forward check had not matured (window runs to 2026-09-30) and earliest_promotion (2026-10-01, Q4's R10 slot) had not arrived. The owner directed the promotion and accepted the risk explicitly ('I can take the risk of promoting without live data'). The frozen forward-check window is UNCHANGED and its read publishes at every month-start digest check through and including 2026-10-01 regardless of this promotion; the rolling demotion rule below is armed from the promotion date and a FAIL demotes mechanically. R10 accounting: Q4-2026's promotion slot is SPENT by this early promotion (Q3's went to 🐳 WHALE-DIP, 2026-07-06); no further promoted signal-behaviour change before 2027-Q1.
entries.what: concentrate the monthly stock-half into the top-3 ⭐ candidates by 12m relative strength (PRD §5j)
entries.gate_artifact: homily_selection_backtest.py (rule pre-registered in docstring) + BACKTEST_RESULTS.md §4 + PRD §5j

forward_check.criterion: mean forward-21-ledger-row raw-close return of ⭐ rows with rank<=3 must EXCEED the mean of ⭐ rows with rank>3 over the window; fewer than min_measured_rows on either side = INSUFFICIENT, decision deferred, no promotion

entries.if_promoted: digest orders ⭐ rows by RS12 with top-3 marked; PLAYBOOK §3.4 becomes split-across-top-3; homily_buyday allocates top-3 (MAX_STARS/ordering); one session, one commit
entries.demotion_rule: if promoted: demote back to equal-split max-5 when top-3 ⭐ rows underperform other-⭐ rows on the same mean forward-21-row metric over any rolling 6-month ledger window ending after promotion; checked by homily_promotions.py at each month-start; demotion is mandatory on a failed check, not a discussion

entries.promotion_basis: OWNER OVERRIDE, recorded 2026-07-12 (#92/D-92): promoted ahead of the clean 2027-Q1 R10 slot on the owner's directive ('concentration is also ok and should be encouraged, allow me to add into winners on dips instead of keeping the 10% hard rule' + 'execute them NOW, dont stop until you're done'). The gate itself ran earlier and independently: D-67/BACKTEST_RESULTS §12 priced 25% as formally adoptable (ties-or-beats 10% in 7/9 redistribute windows, shock-MaxDD within 5 pts) at a recorded cost (−95% single-name shock payout 1.70 vs 1.89 MOIC — half the insurance surrendered deliberately). Uncapped stays excluded (its −95% cell is 1.49; excluded by pre-registered rule). R10 arithmetic: 2026-Q3 🐳 · 2026-Q4 rs12-top3 (spent early) · 2027-Q1 this entry (spent early) — the next free promotion slot is 2027-Q2, and October's #14/#85 reads must split THREE 2026 epochs.
entries.what: per-name ADD cap on the stock book raised 10% → 25% (homily_positions.CAP_PCT, D-27 interlock reaches the buy-day copilot); PLAYBOOK §3.4/§5.1 and digest texts moved with it; dip-adds into winners route through the existing surfaces (⭐-at-shelf · 🟡+🎯 · ⚪+🎯+🐳 ≤2%)
entries.gate_artifact: homily_cap_backtest.py (D-67 pre-committed prongs) + BACKTEST_RESULTS §12 + DESIGNS D-92

forward_check.checker: homily_positions.cap_demotion_line — every daily run (validate [50]), not month-start only
forward_check.criterion: any single held name >=15% of the USD stock book whose last close sits <=50% of its highest close since 2026-07-12 prints the 🚨 demotion banner; the banner repeats daily until acted on

entries.if_promoted: already live: CAP_PCT=25.0 + WARN_PCT=20.0, copilot cap via CAP_FRAC interlock, PLAYBOOK/digest texts, goldens re-pinned deliberately in the same commit
entries.demotion_rule: revert CAP_PCT to 10.0 (and WARN_PCT to 8.0) in the next session after the custom forward_check fires — mandatory, not a discussion; ALSO revert if a yearly #40 re-run of homily_cap_backtest.py shows 25% losing its D-67 prongs (stops tying-or-beating 10% on redistribute windows or shock-MaxDD spread exceeds 5 pts)

entries.what: select between ⭐ candidates by whale-accumulation intensity instead of RS12 (PRD §5k / #80, MARA-vs-WULF pattern)
entries.gate_artifact: NOT YET RUN — pre-registered 2026-07-11 (PRD §8.3 #80): enters the #24 three-way harness at the 2026-10-01 read (whale-top3 vs rs12-top3 vs equal-all) and must tie-or-beat rs12-top3 on all three honest windows incl. the hype-2021 control, else CLOSED

forward_check.criterion: informational until the backtest gate runs: mean forward-21-row return of ⭐ rows with whale_rank<=3 vs rank>3 over the window (whale_rank column live from 2026-07-13)

entries.if_promoted: selection/ordering by whale_rank instead of rs12_rank, same surfaces as rs12-top3
entries.demotion_rule: same rolling-6-month underperformance rule as rs12-top3, frozen here before any gate runs
